dialogue.intro: I am Marek, the final gate of the Elite Four. My ghosts see through walls and my psychics see through lies. There is nowhere to hide from what I bring. Are you certain you wish to proceed?
dialogue.win: Remarkable. You fought through illusion and shadow without flinching. The Champion awaits you. Go with my respect.
dialogue.lose: You looked into the abyss and it consumed you. The mind must be fortress and blade both. Return when yours is sharpened.
